name: Orange Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the Crisco with egg yolks and sugar.
2. Add orange juice and grated rind to the mixture.
3. Sift dry ingredients into a separate bowl.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the creamed mixture.
5. Fold in egg whites last.
6. Let dough rest for 1 hour at room temperature.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 8 minutes.
Icing:
1. Mix powdered sugar with orange juice and grated rind until smooth.
